_readme: This is the content file for the Le Nido website. Edit values here to update property listings, amenities, reviews, and site text without touching any code. Ask Claude to apply changes to the live site after editing.

site.name: Le Nido by Bondd
site.tagline: Feel at home, wherever you land.
site.description: Curated serviced apartments in Lekki for business travellers, diaspora returnees, and Lagos explorers.
site.whatsappGreeting: Hi, I'd like to enquire about a stay at Le Nido

properties.name: Le Nido Lekki 01
properties.tagline: Your private retreat in the heart of Lekki
properties.description: A beautifully designed studio apartment in Lekki Phase 1. Fully air-conditioned, high-speed WiFi, Netflix-ready smart TV, and a fully equipped kitchenette. Perfect for solo travellers, business professionals, and couples looking for a quiet, stylish base in Lagos.

properties.name: Le Nido Lekki 02
properties.tagline: Spacious comfort with a Lagos state of mind
properties.description: A premium 1-bedroom apartment with a separate living area in Lekki Phase 1. Ideal for business travellers, small families, or anyone who wants extra space and privacy. Features a dedicated bedroom with ensuite, open-plan living room, and a full kitchen.

reviews.review: Absolutely beautiful apartment. Spotless, well-equipped, and the host was incredibly responsive. Will definitely book again when I'm back in Lagos.
Came back to Lagos for the first time in years. Le Nido felt like a luxury hotel but with the warmth of home. The location in Lekki was perfect.
Booked direct and saved compared to Airbnb. The workspace desk and reliable WiFi made it perfect for my remote work week. Highly recommend.

perks.title: Best Price Guaranteed
perks.description: No platform service fees. The rate you see is exactly what you pay — nothing added at checkout.

perks.title: Instant Confirmation
perks.description: Pay securely with Paystack and receive your booking confirmation in seconds, not hours.

perks.title: Direct WhatsApp Access
perks.description: Speak directly to the host, not a faceless support queue. Fast answers before and during your stay.

perks.title: Secure Payments
perks.description: Protected by Paystack. Nigerian debit cards, USSD, bank transfers, and VISA accepted.
